In addition, the platform achieved a weekly trading volume of US$1.42 billion last week, setting a new high since its inception, mainly driven by the expiration event on May 29 (US$1.6 billion of TVL expired), setting the best liquidity retention rate in history.

data.title: Binance to Adjust Tick Size for USDⓈ-M Perpetual Futures Contracts
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is set to adjust the tick size for several USDⓈ-M Perpetual Futures Contracts on 2025-06-12 at 06:00 (UTC). This change aims to enhance market liquidity and improve the trading experience for users. The adjustment will not affect the overall trading operations of USDⓈ-M Futures, and API users will notice a change in tick size as well. Users can access the latest tick size information through the GET /fapi/v1/exchangeInfo API endpoint.

The tick size update will not impact existing orders. Orders placed before the update will continue to be matched with the original tick size. The specific adjustments are as follows: For the MEUSDT trading pair, the tick size will change from 0.001 to 0.0001. The SLERFUSDT, BMTUSDT, MOCAUSDT, NFPUSDT, PORTALUSDT, TSTUSDT, and LOKAUSDT trading pairs will see their tick sizes adjusted from 0.0001 to 0.00001. Meanwhile, the MLNUSDT trading pair will have its tick size changed from 0.01 to 0.001.

Traders are advised to review the Trading Rules for more detailed information and adjust their trading strategies accordingly to avoid any unnecessary impact. This update is part of Binance's ongoing efforts to optimize trading conditions and provide a better user experience. The platform emphasizes that the tick size adjustment is a technical change and does not alter the fundamental trading operations of the affected contracts.

data.title: Binance will adjust the minimum price change unit of multiple U-margin contracts
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will adjust the minimum price change unit (TickSize) of 10 U-based perpetual contracts including MEUSDT and SLERFUSDT at 14:00 (Beijing time) on June 12, 2025. After the adjustment, the TickSize of each contract will be reduced by 10 times, and existing orders will not be affected. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: A whale recently began to gradually stop profit on LINK, with a floating profit of over 12 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale has recently begun to gradually stop profiting LINK. It has held 1.75 million LINK since March 2023, and recently transferred 403,000 of them (about 5.87 million US dollars) to Binance for cash. Currently, the address still holds 1.35 million LINK, with a total book value of approximately 18.6 million US dollars, a cumulative profit of more than 12 million US dollars, and a profit of more than 39 million US dollars at the peak of holdings.

data.title: IMF’s Gopinath says trade tensions pose greater threat to emerging markets than Covid
data.description:
IMF warns that tariffs present a tougher challenge for emerging market policymakers than the Covid-19 crisis.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/imfs-gopinath-trade-tensions-are-a-threat/

data.title: Venezuelan Government Cracks Down on Black Market Exchange Rates
data.description: According to Foresight News, the Venezuelan government has taken stringent measures against the social media account 'Monitor Dolar,' which provided exchange rates for the Venezuelan bolivar on the black market. Nearly twenty individuals associated with the account have been arrested. El Dorado, a cryptocurrency platform that was one of the pricing sources for Monitor Dolar, has ceased its operations in Venezuela following the arrests. In response, Venezuelans are increasingly turning to alternative exchange sources, such as cryptocurrency exchanges.

data.title: OKX already supports Unichain network
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, OKX has officially integrated the Unichain network and will support ETH recharges on the Unichain network at 4:00 pm (UTC+8) on June 5, 2025. Users can transfer funds between OKX and the Unichain network.
It is reported that Unichain is an Ethereum Layer-2 network built by the Uniswap team. Compared with Ethereum Layer-1, users on Unichain can trade at a faster speed and lower fees. Unichain provides users with a block time of 1 second and fees that are up to 95% lower than Ethereum Layer-1.

data.description:

Acting on a request from French officials, Morocco’s national police and intelligence service detained Bajjou, who was found carrying an array of bladed weapons and multiple mobile phones, [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/crypto-kidnap-kingpin-nabbed-in-morocco-french-moroccan-suspect-linked-to-wave-of-abductions/

data.title: The United States has seized 145 domains and crypto assets related to the BidenCash dark web market
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News The U.S. Attorney's Office for the Eastern District of Virginia announced that law enforcement agencies have seized 145 domain names and some cryptocurrency assets related to the dark web market BidenCash. Since BidenCash went online in March 2022, it has accumulated more than 117,000 users and has sold more than 15 million stolen credit card information and other personal identity data, with proceeds of more than $17 million. BidenCash also leaked 3.3 million credit card data for free between October 2022 and February 2023 to expand its influence. The seized domain name has been redirected to the law enforcement control page. This case is jointly investigated by the U.S. Secret Service, the FBI, and others, and is one of the actions to combat encryption-driven criminal networks. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: CBO Report: U.S. Tariffs to Reduce Deficit but Impact Economic Growth
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the U.S. Congressional Budget Office (CBO) released an analysis indicating that U.S. President Donald Trump's extensive global tariff plan is projected to reduce the federal deficit by $2.8 trillion over the next decade. However, the report also warns of potential economic slowdown, increased inflation, and diminished purchasing power for American households.

The report, addressed to Democratic congressional leaders, outlines the impact of the administration's broad tariff impositions on multiple countries. It suggests that American households will likely decrease imports from tariff-affected nations, predicting a 0.4 percentage point increase in annual inflation rates between 2025 and 2026.

The analysis assumes the tariffs announced via executive orders from January to May will be implemented long-term. Although a federal court previously ruled that invoking emergency powers for tariff imposition was beyond authority, an appeals court has allowed the tariffs to remain during litigation.

The CBO's findings align with other economic models, indicating that the $2.8 trillion deficit reduction over ten years will come at the cost of reduced household wealth and overall economic contraction. The report estimates a permanent 0.06 percentage point decrease in the annual growth rate of the U.S. real GDP. A prior report from the University of Pennsylvania's Wharton School budget model in April was more pessimistic, forecasting a potential 6% long-term GDP shrinkage and a 5% drop in wage levels.

The CBO emphasizes significant uncertainty in its calculations, partly due to the possibility of the Trump administration altering tariff policy execution at any time.
